_instructions: Values are the spend per 1M tokens in the SAME unit the runner reports, with --usd-cny 1. This account tops up at ~1 CNY = 1 USD (e.g. pay 9.9 CNY -> 10 USD balance), and DeepSeek bills in CNY directly, so 1 USD spent ~= 1 CNY. We therefore store each model's displayed per-1M price as-is and set --usd-cny default to 1, so reported cost equals the real CNY spend. Cache-miss prices are used as a conservative ceiling.

_notes.deepseek: deepseek-v4-pro, official api.deepseek.com, CNY billing: input(cache-miss) 3, output 6, input(cache-hit) 0.025.
_notes.openai: gpt-5.5 via openox '限时特惠组 0.8x': input 4, output 24, cache-read 0.40 (CNY; balance is USD at ~1:1).
_notes.claude: claude-sonnet-4-6 via openox '限时特惠组 0.8x': input 2.40, output 12.00 USD; at ~1 CNY=1 USD this is ~2.40/12.00 CNY. Cheapest input of the three.
_notes.exchange: Top-up rate ~1 CNY = 1 USD, so run with --usd-cny 1 (now the default). If your real top-up rate differs, pass --usd-cny <rate>.
